name: 10-week-product-manager-job-search-plan
description: A time-boxed, iterative 10-week plan for product manager job seekers that balances depth and sustainability by capping weekly effort at 12 hours, with built-in feedback loops for resume refinement, targeted applications, strategic referrals, and progressive interview simulation — including mandatory weekly 10-minute review and adaptive planning triggered by real-world signals like reply rate.
